title: Infosys Foundation Announces Aarohan Social Innovation Awards 2025 Winners
detailed_summary: Infosys Foundation announced the winners of the fourth edition of the Aarohan Social Innovation Awards 2025. Eight innovators were awarded a total of INR 2 crore for social innovations in education, healthcare, and environmental sustainability, selected from over 2,000 entries. The announcement is primarily CSR-related and does not disclose material business, financial, strategic, or operating updates for Infosys Limited.
